data.title: Galaxy CEO calls on global leaders to take action against hacker group Lazarus Group
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Galaxy CEO Mike Novogratz posted on the X platform calling on global leaders to take action against the hacker organization Lazarus Group, while praising Bybit for completing a world-class solution after being attacked.

data.title: Bybit Incident Leaves Market Sentiment Unchanged
data.description:
According to PANews, recent data from Alternative indicates that the Bybit incident has not significantly impacted the Fear and Greed Index. Today, the index decreased to 49 from yesterday's 55, shifting from a state of greed to neutral, without moving into the 'fear' category.

The Fear and Greed Index ranges from 0 to 100 and is composed of several indicators: volatility (25%), market trading volume (25%), social media activity (15%), market surveys (15%), Bitcoin's market dominance (10%), and Google Trends analysis (10%).

data.title: Galaxy CEO Urges Global Action Against Lazarus Group
data.description: According to PANews, Galaxy CEO Mike Novogratz has called on global leaders to take action against the hacker organization Lazarus Group. He made this appeal on the X platform, highlighting the need for a coordinated international response. Novogratz also praised Bybit for its world-class resolution efforts following a recent attack.

data.title: ETH rebounds and breaks through 2700 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market data shows that ETH rebounded and broke through 2700 USDT and is now at 2707 USDT. The 24-hour decline narrowed to 2.74%.

data.title: VINE rose above 0.04 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 30.96%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitget market data shows that VINE rose above 0.04 USDT and is currently trading at 0.0423 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 30.96%.

data.title: Whales Accumulate 930,000 LTC Over Two Weeks
data.description: According to Odaily, on-chain analyst Ali has reported that whales have collectively purchased 930,000 Litecoin (LTC) over the past two weeks.

data.title: Zhu Di Holdings Halts Virtual Currency Mining Plans
data.description: According to PANews, Zhu Di Holdings, a company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, has announced the termination of its plans to establish a wholly-owned subsidiary, Zhu Di Digital Technology Co., Ltd., for engaging in virtual currency mining activities. The proposed subsidiary was intended to focus on the construction and operation management of virtual currency mining farms. The decision to cease these new business activities was made by the company's board of directors and is effective immediately.

data.title: Metalpha deposited 30,006 ETH to Binance four hours ago, equivalent to US$80.48 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Ai Yi, asset management company Metalpha recharged 30,006 ETH to Binance four hours ago, worth 80.48 million US dollars. It has been three months since Metalpha's multi-signature address last recharged a large amount of ETH, and the intention of the recharge has not been confirmed for the time being.

data.title: Whales bought 930,000 LTC in the past two weeks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to on-chain analyst Ali's monitoring, whales have bought a total of 930,000 LTC in the past two weeks.

data.title: Chainflip: Trying its best to stop the flow of funds related to the Bybit theft, but unable to completely block, freeze or redirect any funds
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Chainflip, a cross-chain bridge, responded to the request of Bybit CEO, saying: "We have tried our best to deal with the current situation, but as a decentralized protocol, we cannot completely block, freeze or redirect any funds. However, we have currently shut down some front-end services to prevent the flow of funds." 
Previously, Bybit CEO Ben Zhou posted on the X platform that hackers have been detected trying to transfer BTC through Chainflip. It is hoped that Chainflip will help Bybit block and prevent further transfers of assets to other chains.
